summary: Add dogfood/verify annotations so FRED's API behavior maps to honest test outcomes.
reason: FRED returns HTTP 200 for any search text and treats tail's initial fetch 404 as a warning, so the synthesized error-path probes have no honest non-zero exit (pp:no-error-path-probe on series search and tail). FRED's /related_tags and /tags/series reject the generic synthesized tag value 'example' with HTTP 400, so the happy-path probes need a real tag fixture (pp:happy-args=--tag-names=monthly on tags related and tags series).
validated_outcome: Full live dogfood (level full) passes 110/110 against the real FRED API after these annotations.
